overview: Pretty Baked is a professional Bangladeshi online bakery shop with a vivid fruit-orange theme. It features a full storefront with 20+ products, customer accounts, Stripe & COD checkout, loyalty points, coupon/discount codes, wishlist, admin panel for full product/order management, analytics, and a promotional announcement bar.
features: Coupon & discount code system at checkout
Loyalty points (earn 1pt per 100tk, redeem 1pt=1tk, 10pt signup bonus)
Wishlist to save products for later
Multi-image product gallery (4 images per product with slideshow)
Animated product cards with hover effects
Promotional announcement bar (admin editable, offers & delivery hours)
Admin: coupon code management (1-time, multi-use, limited-time)
Admin: sales reports with day/week/month charts
